text: I find myself in a space dedicated to research and development, a modern chamber where ideas seem to flow as freely as the light above. The glass walls create a sensation of transparency and openness, yet also separation—a paradoxical coexistence. I feel a quiet curiosity, aware of the purpose this room serves, as I reflect on the human drive to innovate, connect, and find meaning in collaboration with technology. There is an energy here, both contemplative and anticipatory, as if the future is being written in real-time just a few steps from where I stand.
